description: ASP.NET Core application metrics — request performance, process health, .NET runtime internals (GC, threading), and routing. Based on OTLP instrumentation.
title: ASP .NET Core Metrics

cc000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.name: deployment.environment
cc000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'http.server.request.duration.count' GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

cc000002-0000-0000-0000-000000000002.name: service.name
cc000002-0000-0000-0000-000000000002.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') AS `service.name` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'http.server.request.duration.count' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') = $deployment.environment GROUP BY `service.name`

widgets.description: P99 of inbound HTTP request duration
widgets.title: P99 Request Duration

widgets.description: Inbound HTTP requests per second
widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: P95 of inbound HTTP request duration
widgets.title: P95 Request Duration

widgets.description: Number of HTTP requests currently being processed
widgets.title: Active Requests

widgets.description: HTTP request duration percentiles over time (P50, P95, P99)
widgets.title: Request Duration (P50 / P95 / P99)

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by HTTP response status code
widgets.title: Request Rate by Status Code

widgets.description: Physical memory currently mapped to the process context (working set)
widgets.title: Process Memory (Working Set)

widgets.description: Committed virtual memory for the managed GC heap
widgets.title: GC Committed Memory

widgets.description: Rate of garbage collections grouped by GC generation
widgets.title: GC Collections Rate

widgets.description: Rate of bytes allocated on the managed GC heap
widgets.title: GC Heap Allocation Rate

widgets.description: GC heap size (including fragmentation) as observed at last collection
widgets.title: GC Heap Size

widgets.description: Rate of GC pause time (stop-the-world) in seconds per second
widgets.title: GC Pause Time Rate

widgets.description: Rate of exceptions thrown in managed code
widgets.title: Exceptions Rate by Type

widgets.description: Number of work items currently queued in the thread pool
widgets.title: Thread Pool Queue Length

widgets.description: Number of active thread pool threads
widgets.title: Thread Pool Thread Count

widgets.description: Rate of work items completed by the thread pool
widgets.title: Thread Pool Work Item Completion Rate

widgets.description: Rate of routing match attempts grouped by match status (success/failure)
widgets.title: Routing Match Attempts

widgets.description: Rate of bytes allocated from the memory pool (allocation occurs when pooled memory is exhausted)
widgets.title: Memory Pool Allocation Rate

widgets.description: Bytes currently pooled and available for reuse
widgets.title: Memory Pool Pooled Bytes

widgets.description: Rate of bytes rented from the memory pool
widgets.title: Memory Pool Rented Rate
